findings.title: FaceAR/OpenFaceIOS
findings.description: OpenFace is get from https://github.com/TadasBaltrusaitis/OpenFace, a state-of-the art open source tool intended for facial landmark detection, head pose estimation, facial action unit recognition, and eye-gaze estimation. And I create an ios project. Delete Dlib,TBB,Boost. Only use OpenCV .
